title: Archangel sword
description: Makes minecraft netherite sword to archangel sword 3d model
body: Archangel Sword is a sacred blade of the heavenly host, born in the very heart of the divine forge, where metal melts from the light of the stars, and the flame cleanses all unclean things. Its blade is long and immaculately smooth, as if carved from pure radiance, and it seems as if golden light is slowly flowing inside it. Ancient runes flicker along the edge, awakening in battle and filling each blow with crushing power. The sword emits a soft chime, like the echo of a chorus, and this sound causes the darkness to retreat even before the steel collides. It easily cuts through armor, flesh, and magical barriers, and the touch of the blade cleanses defilement and breaks curses. For those whose intentions are impure, Archangel Sword becomes heavy and cold, like a stone, but in the hands of a righteous man it moves smoothly and swiftly, like an extension of the will. Legends say that the archangels used this sword to seal demons and protect the borders of the world, and therefore it is considered not just a weapon, but the embodiment of heavenly judgment, light and last hope in the face of impending darkness.
